name: pa_always_zero
reason: If PA masking zeroes all addresses, range_alloc_and_map_io would map every IO page to physical address 0

name: nonzero_produces_empty_entry
code:
proof fn phi_2_nonzero_produces_empty_entry(v: usize)
    requires
        v != 0,
    ensures
        spec_usize2page_entry(v).is_empty(),
{
}
reason: If non-zero usize values decode to empty page entries, IO page table entries created during mapping would all appear unmapped

name: present_implies_write
reason: If every present page entry is writable, read-only IO mappings are impossible and memory protection for device MMIO regions is broken

name: pa_preserves_all_bits
reason: If PA masking is identity, permission and flag bits leak into physical addresses used for IO mappings, corrupting device memory targets

name: present_implies_execute_disable
reason: If all present entries have execute-disable set, executable device MMIO regions mapped by range_alloc_and_map_io become non-executable
